findings.description: `UnknownError` (java.lang.UnknownError) appears as a distinct exception class in the source table but is absent from the s2 hints array. All other exception class short names (ThreadDeath, InternalError, StackOverflowError, OutOfMemoryError, VirtualMachineError) are listed; UnknownError is the only one missing.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: `java.lang.UnknownError | なし | Fatal | 捕捉した例外を再送出 |`
